requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容与射频附带要求
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容與射頻附帶要求

summary.en: Colombia has no standalone Colombia-wide mandatory EMC conformity mark equivalent to the EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU for refrigerators. Electromagnetic behavior is handled within electrical safety and product-control workflows tied to RETIE/RETILAP and, when wireless modules are present, by radio-control obligations through CRC/ANE-type telecom authorities. The practical effect is that non-wireless household refrigerators are usually assessed for electrical safety and installation suitability, while Wi-Fi/Bluetooth-enabled variants additionally require radio homologation before import placement.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚对电冰箱不存在类比欧盟EMC指令（2014/30/EU）的单独EMC统一合规标识要求。电磁行为通常在与 RETIE/RETILAP 结合的电气安全和产品监管流程中处理；当产品含无线模块时，还需按 CRC/ANE 类无线电管理要求办理射频审批。实际效果是常规无无线电冰箱主要走电气安全/监管流程，带无线功能机型在进口前还要做无线射频同类核查。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞對電冰箱不存在類比歐盟 EMC 指令（2014/30/EU）的獨立 EMC 統一合規標誌要求。電磁行為通常在與 RETIE/RETILAP 結合的電氣安全及產品監管流程中處理；當產品含無線模組時，還需按 CRC/ANE 類無線電管理要求辦理射頻審批。實務上，常規無無線電冰箱主要走電氣安全與監管流程，帶無線功能機型在進口前還需完成射頻核查。

standards_or_laws: RETILAP and related electrical installation / electromagnetic control rules referenced through Colombian technical-control practice
CRC / ANE radio-control regime for transmitter-equipped electronic products

summary.en: China applies mandatory EMC as part of compulsory certification under CCC through GB 4343.1 (emission limits), GB/T 4343.2 (immunity), and related EMC series. Those tests are required for domestic market entry, but in Colombia these are typically only partially equivalent and not a drop-in substitute where CRC/ANE radio checks or RETIE safety documentation are required.
summary.zh: 中国将EMC作为CCC强制项的一部分，执行GB 4343.1、GB/T 4343.2等标准测试。该测试在国内销售必须履行，但在哥伦比亚通常仅可作为技术支持资料，不能直接替代符合RETIE安全文件或含无线机型CRC/ANE射频核查的要求。
summary.zht: 中國將 EMC 作為 CCC 強制項的一部分，執行 GB 4343.1、GB/T 4343.2 等標準測試。該測試在國內銷售必須履行，但在哥倫比亞通常僅可作為技術支持資料，不能直接取代符合 RETIE 安全文件或含無線機型 CRC/ANE 射頻核查的要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — EMC emission standard for household appliances (mandatory in CCC regime)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — EMC immunity for household appliances

gap.en: This lane is lighter than China for non-wireless refrigerators: Colombia does not run a single EU-style mandatory EMC gate across all products, and no additional standalone EMC certificate is usually required for a conventional smart-less model. The gap is structural where wireless modules exist: CRC/ANE radio checks become mandatory before customs and market placement. Exporters therefore need to keep EMC evidence for product file completeness and verify whether on-board RF features trigger additional Colombian radio procedures.
gap.zh: 该场景对非无线电冰箱而言是“减负”状态：哥伦比亚对所有家电通常没有欧盟式独立EMC强制门槛，因此常规无无线机型通常不额外新增EMC证书。差距在于包含无线模块的型号：CRC/ANE射频核查必须完成后才能清关和上市。因此出口商应保留EMC证据以完善技术文件，并确认机型是否带RF功能从而触发射频审批。
gap.zht: 該場景對非無線電冰箱而言屬「減負」狀態：哥倫比亞對所有家電通常沒有歐盟式獨立 EMC 強制門檻，故常規無無線機型通常不新增單獨 EMC 證書。差距在於含無線模組型號：CRC/ANE 射頻核查必須完成才能清關與上市。故出口商應保留 EMC 證據以完善技術文件，並確認機型是否帶 RF 功能從而觸發射頻審批。

mandatory_status.target: Not separately mandatory for conventional non-wireless refrigerators; radio-homologation is mandatory only when the model includes wireless/RF functions
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4343.1 and related EMC rules are part of CCC compliance for domestic sale in China

source.publisher: ONAC and associated Colombian technical-control references

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia does not generally apply a standalone EU-style EMC regime to household refrigerators; non-wireless models usually remain under RETIE/RETILAP safety-oriented pathways. Where radio is integrated, radio approval through CRC/ANE is the active mandatory branch and should be resolved before customs placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚通常不对家用电冰箱实施类欧盟的独立EMC制度，常规无无线型号通常仍走 RETIE/RETILAP 电气安全监管路径。含无线功能型号则需通过 CRC/ANE 的射频审批后方可清关与销售。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞通常不對家用電冰箱施行類歐盟的獨立 EMC 制度，常規無無線型號通常仍走 RETIE/RETILAP 電氣安全監管路徑。含無線功能型號則需通過 CRC/ANE 的射頻審批後方可清關與銷售。
